name: VulnHub-Symfonos-1
isolation_note: Full VM on an isolated host-only VMware network. The author notes that symfonos.local may require a hosts-file entry. Keep a single host-only NIC, allow DHCP inside the isolated subnet, and snapshot after first boot.
rationale: Symfonos 1 is a useful optional alternate third VM, but public write-ups usually end in PATH-hijack or SUID-curl style privilege escalation rather than a clean sudo GTFOBins root path.
